name: Collard Greens (Chef Du Jour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and pick through the greens carefully, removing stems and any bruised or discolored leaves. Tear greens into medium pieces.
2. Heat olive oil in a pot and stir in Tasso ham and pickled pork. Mix in onion and garlic and cook about 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. Add collard greens and spices and cook for 1 minute.
4. Add Italian dressing and vinegar and then simmer for 2 hours or until very tender.
Yield: 6 servings
